title: Building Permit
description: Required before constructing, renovating, or demolishing any structure. Issued by the City Engineering Office under the National Building Code (PD 1096).

requirements.name: Lot Plan / Survey Plan
requirements.description: Duly signed by a licensed geodetic engineer

requirements.name: Building Plans
requirements.description: Architectural, structural, electrical, and sanitary plans signed by licensed professionals

requirements.name: Tax Declaration of Property
requirements.description: Current tax declaration from City Assessor

requirements.name: Proof of Ownership or Authorization
requirements.description: Title, deed of sale, or written consent of owner

requirements.name: Locational Clearance
requirements.description: From the City Planning and Development Office

fees.name: Building Permit Fee
fees.description: Based on floor area and type of construction per National Building Code

title: Certificate of Occupancy
description: Certifies that a building is safe and fit for occupancy after construction. Required before using any newly built structure. Issued by the City Engineering Office.

requirements.name: Approved Building Permit
requirements.description: Original approved building permit

requirements.name: As-Built Plans
requirements.description: Final construction plans reflecting actual built structure

requirements.name: Fire Safety Inspection Certificate
requirements.description: From Bureau of Fire Protection

fees.name: Occupancy Permit Fee
fees.description: Based on floor area per National Building Code

title: Locational Clearance / Zoning Certification
description: Certifies that a proposed land use or construction is consistent with the Comprehensive Land Use Plan (CLUP) of Kabankalan City. Required before applying for a building permit.

requirements.name: Lot Plan
requirements.description: Certified by a licensed geodetic engineer

requirements.name: Tax Declaration
requirements.description: Current property tax declaration

requirements.name: Letter of Intent
requirements.description: Stating the proposed use of the property

fees.name: Locational Clearance Fee
fees.description: Based on area and use type

title: Marriage License
description: Required document for legal marriage. Filed at the City Civil Registrar's Office. Published for 10 days before release per the Family Code of the Philippines.

requirements.name: Birth Certificate (PSA)
requirements.description: For both parties

requirements.name: Certificate of No Marriage (CENOMAR)
requirements.description: From PSA — confirms both parties are single

requirements.name: Barangay Clearance
requirements.description: For both parties

requirements.name: Valid Government ID
requirements.description: For both parties

requirements.name: Community Tax Certificate (Cedula)
requirements.description: For both parties

requirements.name: Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate
requirements.description: Required under RA 9262 and local ordinances

location.name: Office of the City Civil Registrar

title: Death Certificate Registration
description: Registration of death with the City Civil Registrar. Required within 30 days of death per RA 3753 (Civil Registration Law). Enables release of remains and estate settlement.

requirements.name: Medical Certificate of Death
requirements.description: Signed by attending physician or health officer

requirements.name: Valid ID of Informant
requirements.description: Person reporting the death

requirements.name: Burial Permit
requirements.description: From City Health Office — required before interment

fees.name: Death Certificate Registration
fees.description: FREE — registration itself is no cost

fees.name: Certified Copy
fees.description: Per copy of certified death certificate

location.name: Office of the City Civil Registrar

title: Burial Permit
description: Required before interment or cremation of remains. Issued by the City Health Office. Must be secured within 48 hours of death.

requirements.name: Medical Certificate of Death
requirements.description: Signed by attending physician

requirements.name: Valid ID of Applicant
requirements.description: Next of kin or funeral parlor representative

title: Sanitary Permit
description: Required for food establishments, public pools, salons, and other businesses with public health impact. Renewed annually. Issued by the City Health Office under PD 856 (Sanitation Code).

requirements.name: Business Permit
requirements.description: Current year business permit or application

requirements.name: Health Certificate of Employees
requirements.description: Medical certificate for all food handlers

requirements.name: Water Potability Test Result
requirements.description: For food establishments using water in operations

fees.name: Sanitary Permit Fee
fees.description: Based on establishment type and size

title: Health Certificate
description: Medical certificate required for food handlers, public establishment workers, and employment. Issued by the City Health Office after medical examination.

requirements.name: Valid ID
requirements.description: Government-issued ID

requirements.name: Chest X-Ray Result
requirements.description: Recent chest X-ray from accredited facility

requirements.name: Stool Exam Result
requirements.description: For food handlers

title: Tree Cutting / Earthballing Permit
description: Required before cutting, trimming, or earthballing trees on private or public land. Issued by the City Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO) under RA 9175 and local ordinances.

requirements.name: Written Application / Letter Request
requirements.description: Addressed to the City Mayor stating reason for tree removal

requirements.name: Proof of Land Ownership
requirements.description: Title or tax declaration

requirements.name: Photo of the Tree
requirements.description: Recent photograph showing tree location

fees.name: Tree Cutting Permit Fee
fees.description: Fee based on number and species of trees

location.name: City Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO)

title: Farmer / Fisherfolk Registration (RSBSA)
description: Registration under the Registry System for Basic Sectors in Agriculture (RSBSA). Required to access DA subsidy programs, crop insurance (PCIC), and agricultural loans. Processed through the City Agriculture Office.

requirements.name: Valid Government ID
requirements.description: PhilSys, voter's ID, or any government ID

requirements.name: Barangay Certificate
requirements.description: Certifying you are a resident farmer/fisherfolk

requirements.name: Land Documents (if landowner)
requirements.description: Tax declaration or lease agreement

title: Senior Citizen ID (OSCA ID)
description: Official ID issued to citizens 60 years old and above. Entitles holders to 20% discount and VAT exemption on medicines, food, and services under RA 9994 (Expanded Senior Citizens Act). Processed through the Office for Senior Citizens Affairs (OSCA).

requirements.name: Birth Certificate (PSA)
requirements.description: Proof of age — must be 60 years or older

requirements.name: Proof of Residency
requirements.description: Barangay certificate or utility bill

requirements.name: 1x1 ID Photo
requirements.description: Recent photo

location.name: City Social Welfare and Development Office (OSCA)

title: PWD ID Application
description: Official ID for Persons with Disabilities. Entitles holders to 20% discount and VAT exemption on medicines and services under RA 10754. Processed at the City Social Welfare and Development Office.

requirements.name: Medical Certificate
requirements.description: Certifying nature of disability, signed by a licensed physician

requirements.name: Birth Certificate (PSA)
requirements.description: Proof of identity

requirements.name: Barangay Certificate
requirements.description: Proof of residency

requirements.name: 1x1 ID Photo
requirements.description: Recent photo

location.name: City Social Welfare and Development Office

title: Fire Safety Inspection Certificate (FSIC)
description: Certificate issued by the Bureau of Fire Protection (BFP) confirming a structure meets fire safety standards. Required annually for business permit renewal for applicable establishments.

requirements.name: Business Permit or Application
requirements.description: Current business permit or renewal application

requirements.name: Fire Safety Compliance Report
requirements.description: Prepared by a licensed fire safety practitioner for larger establishments

fees.name: FSIC Fee
fees.description: Based on establishment gross sales and floor area per RA 9514 (Fire Code)

location.name: Bureau of Fire Protection — Kabankalan City

title: Solid Waste / Garbage Collection Request
description: Report missed garbage collections, request special waste collection, or report illegal dumpsites. Handled by the City Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO) under RA 9003 (Ecological Solid Waste Management Act).

requirements.name: Written or Verbal Complaint
requirements.description: Barangay, street address, and nature of concern

location.name: City Environment and Natural Resources Office (CENRO)

processingTime: Within 24-72 hours depending on request type
